fields.title: Port tau to Effect v4 patterns from zetesis
fields.description: Harden tau extension by adopting zetesis stack patterns: oxlint/oxfmt, knip, Effect language service plugin, tsconfig hardening, bump Effect to latest beta.
fields.close_reason: Tooling stack ported from zetesis: oxlint, oxfmt, knip, tsconfig hardening, Effect LS plugin, pinned Effect versions, dead dep cleanup.
